title: Statice lachnolepis
taxonomy: Statice lachnolepis is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is often cultivated for its vibrant, long-lasting flowers. The plant's classification is as follows: it is a member of the genus Limonium, but some sources still place it under the genus Statice. Limonium is a genus of flowering plants that are often referred to as sea lavenders or statice. These plants are known for their ability to thrive in dry conditions.
